title: matchify: A Python package for entity resolution and deduplication
description:
matchify is a Python package for entity resolution. Five models under a common interface: hash-based exact match, rule-based field similarity (Flex), supervised MLP on distance features, pretrained sentence-BERT, and a fine-tuned Siamese encoder. Evaluated with MRR and per-threshold precision/recall on four benchmarks (Amazon-Google, Abt-Buy, DBLP-ACM, and a synthetic person-record dataset).

Built for EN.601.507 at Johns Hopkins, Spring 2023, advised by Tom Lippincott.
